subcodes.first_line: The divine words which have been revealed from the Source of heavenly utterance in a wondrous Arabic tongue transcend all reckoning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کلمات الهی که از مصدر بیان سبحانی بلحن بدیع عربی نازل گشته زیاده از حد احصا
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment
